title: The Victory of Abu al-'Abbis and His Activity against the Zanj in This Area
description: His Activity Against the Zan j in This Area" According to Muhammad b. Al-Hasan-Muhammad b. Hammgd": When news of how the Zanj entered Wasic and carried on (as reported above) reached Abu Ahmad b. al-Mutawakkil, he urged his son Abu al-'Abbas, to proceed to the area and fight against them. Abu al-'Abbas did so promptly. At the time of Abu al-'Abbas 's departure, Abu Ahmad rode to Bustin Musa al-Hadi"70 to inspect the troops and their equipment. This was during Rabi' II a66 (November so-December 18, 879).

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 37
